'''dhabozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaerilid|chaerilid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaerilid|chaerilid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhabozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæbezeth|dhæbezeth]] || [[word:dhæbezej|dhæbezej]] || [[word:dhæbezesh|dhæbezesh]] || [[word:dhæbeze|dhæbeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhabobozoth|dhabobozoth]] || [[word:dhabobozoj|dhabobozoj]] || [[word:dhabobozosh|dhabobozosh]] || [[word:dhabobozo|dhabobozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhabozoth|dhabozoth]] || [[word:dhabozoj|dhabozoj]] || [[word:dhabozosh|dhabozosh]] || [[word:dhabozo|dhabozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhabofzoth|dhabofzoth]] || [[word:dhabofzoj|dhabofzoj]] || [[word:dhabofzosh|dhabofzosh]] || [[word:dhabofzof|dhabofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhabozotho|dhabozotho]] || [[word:dhabozojo|dhabozojo]] || [[word:dhabozosho|dhabozosho]] || [[word:dhabozoko|dhabozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhabozoth|dhabozoth]] || [[word:dhabozoj|dhabozoj]] || [[word:dhabozosh|dhabozosh]] || [[word:dhabozo|dhabozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhabozothol|dhabozothol]] || [[word:dhabozojol|dhabozojol]] || [[word:dhabozoshol|dhabozoshol]] || [[word:dhabozokol|dhabozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhabozothotho|dhabozothotho]] || [[word:dhabozojojo|dhabozojojo]] || [[word:dhabozoshosho|dhabozoshosho]] || [[word:dhabozoko|dhabozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhabozothon|dhabozothon]] || [[word:dhabozojon|dhabozojon]] || [[word:dhabozoshon|dhabozoshon]] || [[word:dhabozokon|dhabozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhabozothoro|dhabozothoro]] || [[word:dhabozojoro|dhabozojoro]] || [[word:dhabozoshoro|dhabozoshoro]] || [[word:dhabozokoro|dhabozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
